supersede_note: Skill 57 is the canonical weekly-social engine (see BOUNDARY-35-vs-57.md). v0.2.0 IS the 35<->57 merge target (MERGE-INTEGRATION-PLAN.md, QC 9.2 APPROVED): the seven Skill-35 extras are FOLDED IN (twitter parity C1, live discovery C2, podcast audio C3, newsletter C4, blog C5, engage C6, thumbnails+stories C7) and four honestly DEFER to named versions (narrated Reels v0.3.0, syndicate v0.4.0, persona+memory adapters v0.5.0) via fail-closed stubs. 35 -> ARCHIVED per-client only after 57 proves parity end-to-end. During coexistence: 35 delegates the core to 57; 57 NEVER delegates to 35. The per-client 35->57 migration (archive 35, remove the skill35-weekly-theme Saturday cron, re-point state, prevent double-posting) is a FLEET operation requiring operator direction — NOT rolled from this build.

creative_layer.override_logging: AF-SM-OVERRIDE-UNLOGGED (a silent deviation is the only forbidden deviation)

provider_rules.posting: client GHL Private Integration Token + locationId + connected social accounts

cron.name: social-media-weekly-theme
cron.invariant: exactly one weekly-theme cron per box; legacy skill35-weekly-theme/weekly-batch retired

capability_gated: media modes require client Kie.ai + Gemini keys; preflight blocks gracefully with a labeled report
podcast requires client Fish-Audio + Podbean; unconfigured -> PODCAST_DEFERRED labeled skip, never a failure
